svg.title: Full UX flow for expense tracker with notification system
svg.desc: Eight flows: onboarding, email parsing, manual entry, dashboard, insights, budgets, notification engine, and alert tone system

g.text: "11 Bolt rides. At this point Bolt should be paying you."
"First week under budget. Rare. Historic, even."

svg.text: Alert rules: max 1 funny alert/day | pattern must repeat 3+ times | user can switch to serious mode in settings | email fallback if push declined
